title: Thumbnail System Studies
description: Five independent short-video cover concepts spanning true crime, science, cooking, books, and sports, each optimized for thumbnail clarity and category signal.
creative_direction: Each image acts like a channel-ready thumbnail system rather than a poster: one clear focal face or object, one decisive hook zone, simplified category coding, and strong shrink-to-small readability. The set intentionally spans different content verticals to test reusable cover logic across formats.

en.title: Thumbnail System Studies
en.description: Five independent short-video cover concepts spanning true crime, science, cooking, books, and sports, each optimized for thumbnail clarity and category signal.

zh-CN.title: 封面系统单图研究
zh-CN.description: 五张独立短视频封面概念，覆盖罪案、科普、美食、读书和体育，重点测试缩略图清晰度与栏目识别。
